title: Site Family Schema
description: Phase 1 Step 4 Wave 1 — populated site family schema. Site identity, naming, URL rules, project metadata, phase association, archive/read-only behavior, and cross-references to source systems. Field set traces verbatim to fields/families/site.fields.json and Standard Project Site Template Contract §3.2, §5, §5.6, §6.1, §6.2. mvp_status binds to the canonical Decision Closure four-value enum (VR-24).

ProjectId.description: HB Intel internal stable project identifier.

ProjectBaseNumber.description: First six characters of the accounting number, hyphen retained; immutable. Example: 26-000.

ProjectBaseNumberNoHyphen.description: URL slug derived from ProjectBaseNumber. Example: 26000.

ProjectPhaseSuffix.description: Phase portion of the accounting number; updatable. Example: -00, -01, -02.

ProjectName.description: Project name; editable post-provisioning by Admin.

DisplayName.description: Compound display name; pattern '{ProjectNumber} - {ProjectName}'; capped at 64 characters.

ShortProjectNameSlug.description: Derived URL slug; lowercase ASCII alphanumerics, collapsed hyphens, truncated to 32 chars at hyphen boundary.

ProjectStage.description: Lifecycle stage. VR-02 (allowed values), VR-04 ('Archived' forbidden as Stage), VR-05 ('active_construction' is Stage only).

ProjectStatus.description: Operational status. VR-03 (allowed values), VR-09 (archive behavior), VR-29 (read-only on Closed/Archived).

ProjectType.description: Vertical. VR-01 (allowed values), VR-05 ('active_construction' forbidden as Type), VR-06 (deprecated tokens forbidden).

Client.description: Client / Owner; required at provisioning (Accounting Finalization).

ProjectExecutive.description: PX assignment (UPN). Fallback Procore mapping owner per VR-11; phase-based access manager per VR-27.

ProjectManager.description: PM assignment (UPN). Primary Procore mapping owner per VR-11; phase-based access manager per VR-27.

ProjectAccountant.description: Project Accountant (UPN). VR-11: Project Accountant is NOT the Procore mapping owner.

TemplateVersion.description: Template version stamped by the installer; cross-references template-manifest.templateVersion.

ProvisioningRunId.description: Provisioning run identifier; cross-references audit (§20). VR-23.

SageIntacctProjectId.description: Sage Intacct project identifier. Sage Intacct = accounting book of record (VR-14).

City.description: Optional decomposition of Project Address. Runtime Configuration.

County.description: Optional decomposition of Project Address. Runtime Configuration.

State.description: Optional decomposition of Project Address. Runtime Configuration.

ManagerOfOperationalExcellence.description: Set during construction phase (UPN). Runtime Configuration.

archiveDisplayNamePrefix.description: Display-name prefix '[ARCHIVED] ' applied on archive. VR-09.

archiveUrlPreserved.description: URL preserved on archive (do not move sites at archive). VR-09.

archiveLibrariesReadOnly.description: Libraries flip to read-only on archive (per §14). VR-09, VR-29.

decisionClosureStatus.description: Canonical Decision Closure Register status — VR-24.

projectStage.description: Bound to enums.schema.json canonicalEnumSets.ProjectStage. 'Archived' is forbidden as ProjectStage (VR-04).

projectType.description: Bound to enums.schema.json canonicalEnumSets.ProjectType. Forbidden as ProjectType: 'active_construction' (VR-05); 'preconstruction_only', 'warranty_closeout' (VR-06).
